meaning: adj.旋转的,转动的,摇摆的,起伏的n.旋转,翻滚,动摇
examples: They've covered an old Rolling Stones number.
He walked with a rolling gait.
Mist was rolling in from the sea.
The Rolling Stones album A Bigger Bang also sold its first one million copies in Europe.
By that he means he keeps his blast furnace and rolling mills running as much as possible.
